name: Bread & Butter
short_description: A roguelite arena shooter starring you, a gutsy bread slice, and your butter buddy battling side by side. Survive waves of evil veggies, stack wild weapon combos, and unleash absurd builds in relentless top-down chaos.
detailed_description:
🥪 Bread & Butter: Team Up, Fight Back!

🍞 Dual Heroes, One Fight – You’re a fearless slice of bread, but you’re never alone. Your butter companion battles by your side, upgradable and unstoppable, in this chaotic auto-combat survival fest.

🥕 Evil Veggie Onslaught – Face 25 waves of angry, evil vegetables—broccoli brutes, tomato terrors, and more—all out to squash you and your buttery buddy.

🔫 Auto-Fire Frenzy – Weapons blaze nonstop. You dodge, weave, and survive on a tight map swarming with foes—run circles or blast through, your call.

🛠️ Double the Upgrades – Kit out you and your butter with up to six weapons each, stacking six tiers of wild effects. Flaming toast? Dashing butter deathmachine? Build it.

💥 Power-Up Chaos – Stack absurd items and buffs for ridiculous runs—every combo’s a new way to shred the veggie horde.

🍽️ Pick Your Pair – Mix and match Bread & Butter duos, each with killer perks. Dash through foes, scoop loot, or brawl up close—tons of teams to master.

🎨 Sassy Cartoon Carnage – Fast-paced action meets bold, cheeky characters—grumpy carrots, smug celery, and bread with attitude.

🔥 Survive the Madness – 25 waves. Tiny map. Tons of enemies. Weak? Run for your life. Strong? Crush ‘em all. Prove bread beats veggies every time.
